displayNameZh: 轨道聚合 Logo 揭示
summary: Logo Orbit Reveal component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的轨道聚合 Logo 揭示组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/logo-orbit-reveal/src/LogoOrbitReveal.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `LogoOrbitReveal` and `logoOrbitRevealDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Logo Orbit Reveal Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/logo-orbit-reveal to my project. Preserve the exported LogoOrbitRevealProps API and register the LogoOrbitReveal composition with the default props.
